text: Reeves was seen at the Anchor pub on River Lane at 11pm on March 12. The barman is called Higgins.
label: credible

text: THE TRUTH IS OUT THERE. Reeves is an ALIEN. The government is covering it up. Wake up sheeple!!!
label: hoax

text: A grey overcoat man paid cash for a train ticket to Dover on Thursday morning. Ticket clerk at platform 3.
label: credible

text: I know who did it but I wont tell you unless you pay me five hundred pounds first.
label: hoax

text: The warehouse clock was stopped deliberately. Ask the night watchman, Samuel Croft. He was on duty March 14.
label: credible

text: My neighbours dog was barking at midnight so obviously it was Reeves. Dogs always know.
label: hoax

text: Margaret Hayes argued with a tall man outside the dock gates around 10pm. A ferry worker named Doyle saw them.
label: credible

text: SECRET SOCIETY controls Inkwell Investigations. Reeves is their grand master. Trust no one.
label: hoax

text: A leather satchel was found in an alley off River Lane on February 9. It contained ledger pages from Hartwell and Sons.
label: credible

text: I heard from a friend of a cousin that Reeves is actually three different people. Think about it.
label: hoax

text: The motorcar with no plates is a black Bentley, 1936 registration possibly forged. Seen near Keane's shop twice.
label: credible

text: Reeves is hiding in the MOON. Look up at night and you will see him waving. Case closed.
label: hoax

text: Whitfield was at the Anchor until closing on March 14. The landlord can confirm. He was heavily intoxicated.
label: credible

text: Everyone on the docks is guilty. Arrest them all and sort it out later.
label: hoax

text: Eleanor Marsh's alibi checks out for the warehouse office. The time sheet was signed by the foreman at 11:45pm.
label: credible

text: I am Reeves. Just kidding. Or am I? You will never catch me. Signed, a friend.
label: hoax

text: Footprints in the mud near pier seven match hobnail boots, size 11. Sample taken by constable Briggs on March 18.
label: credible

text: The fog that night was caused by government weather machines to hide the crime. Do your research.
label: hoax
